project.name: MHR B2B client
project.description: My Health Record B2B client (Java 11, Jakarta XML Web Services)

bannedDependencies.message: Use Eclipse EE4J jaxws-rt and Jakarta XML APIs, not legacy Metro / javax JAX-WS or JAXB (test-scoped jaxb-api excepted for legacy NEHTA test fixtures).

requireFilesExist.message: This build requires the PCEHR WSDL/XSD tree under wsdls/src/main/resources. Install pcehr-compiled-wsdl-java at ${pcehr.wsdl.version}. Optional wsimport validation: mvn -Pwsimport verify.

scripts.script:
def bd = project.build.directory as File def out = new File(bd, 'generated-sources/wsimport') out.mkdirs() def base = new File(bd, 'generated-sources/wsimport-parts') def names = [ 'wsimport-b2b-document-registry', 'wsimport-b2b-document-repository', 'wsimport-b2b-get-audit-view', 'wsimport-b2b-get-change-history-view', 'wsimport-b2b-get-individual-details-view', 'wsimport-b2b-get-representative-list', 'wsimport-b2b-get-template', 'wsimport-b2b-get-view', 'wsimport-b2b-pcehr-profile', 'wsimport-b2b-register-pcehr', 'wsimport-b2b-remove-document', 'wsimport-b2b-search-template' ] def fixWsimportJavadoc = { String text -> if (text.contains('schema fragment')) { text = text .replace('<p>', '

') .replace('</p>', '') .replace('<pre>{@code', '

')
                                                .replace('}</pre>', '
') } return text.replace('{@link byte[]}', '{@code byte[]}') } names.each { String part -> def dir = new File(base, part) if (!dir.isDirectory()) return dir.eachFileRecurse(groovy.io.FileType.FILES) { File f -> def rel = dir.toPath().relativize(f.toPath()).toString().replace('\\', '/') // Hand-maintained under wsdls/src/main/java/pcehr_override/. if (rel.startsWith('pcehr_override/')) return def target = new File(out, rel) target.parentFile.mkdirs() def content = fixWsimportJavadoc(f.getText('UTF-8')) target.setText(content, 'UTF-8') } } project.getCompileSourceRoots().findAll { String p -> p.contains('wsimport-parts') }.each { project.removeCompileSourceRoot(it) } if (base.isDirectory()) { base.deleteDir() }
